name: example-plugin
description: An example plugin demonstrating all available plugin.json fields

api_endpoint.title: API Endpoint
api_endpoint.description: Base URL for the API this plugin connects to

allowed_environments.title: Allowed Environments
allowed_environments.description: Comma-separated list of deployment environments this plugin may target

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: Number of times to retry failed requests before giving up

verbose_logging.title: Verbose Logging
verbose_logging.description: Enable detailed logging output for debugging

config_file.title: Config File
config_file.description: Path to an optional local config file to merge with plugin defaults

workspace_dir.title: Workspace Directory
workspace_dir.description: Directory where the plugin stores working files

channel_name.title: Slack Channel Name
channel_name.description: Name of the Slack channel to post notifications to
